title: Term Mapping
subtitle: Bulk-suggest ontology concept assignments for Assets, Data Contracts, and Data Products. Decisions are made in the Asset Reviews workspace.

actions.selectRunHint: Select a run on the left, or start a new one.

recent.title: Recent runs
recent.empty: No runs yet. Start one with New run.

detail.reviewsLinkSuffix: workspace. Each suggestion becomes one ReviewedAsset there; decisions flow back into this run automatically.

confirm.undo: Undo run {{id}}? This removes every link this run created.

runConfig.title: New Term Mapping Run
runConfig.description: Pick the ontologies and target entities. The heuristic suggester will propose concept assignments you can review before applying.
runConfig.noCustomerOntologies: No customer ontologies are loaded yet. Upload one in Settings → RDF Sources, or generate one via the Ontology Generator, then re-open this dialog.
runConfig.shippedHelp: The internal urn:taxonomy:ontos-ontology (Ontos asset typing schema) is never a valid mapping target.

validation.noTargetType: Pick at least one target type
validation.noTargetTypeDescription: Select what kind of entity the suggester should look at.
validation.noOntologyDescription: Either leave "Use every enabled customer ontology" on, or pick specific ones.

toast.createdEmpty: Run created but response was empty

generateReview.title: Generate Review for Run
generateReview.description: Spawn a Data Asset Review containing every suggestion in this run. Decisions made in the review flow back to the suggestion queue.
generateReview.reviewerEmailHelp: Defaults to you. Hand off to a domain steward if needed.
generateReview.includeAcceptedHelp: Useful when you want the reviewer to confirm prior decisions, not just triage pending rows.
generateReview.eligibleSummaryOne: 1 suggestion will become a reviewable asset ({{pending}} pending{{acceptedPart}}).
generateReview.eligibleSummaryMany: {{eligible}} suggestions will become reviewable assets ({{pending}} pending{{acceptedPart}}).

suggestion.overrideIriHelp: Leave blank to accept the suggested IRI. Override to attach a different concept from the same ontology.
suggestion.commentPlaceholder: Notes for the reviewer / audit trail.
